assertions.expectation: Distinguishes between dev (Rapid) and prod (Stable) clusters in the checklists
assertions.reason: The response clearly acknowledges the dev/prod distinction and recommends testing on dev clusters first, includes prod-specific considerations section

assertions.expectation: Recognizes Autopilot limitations (no node management, no SSH, mandatory resource requests)
assertions.reason: While it mentions node auto-provisioning and that node pools will auto-update, it doesn't explicitly address mandatory resource requests or no SSH access limitations

assertions.expectation: Includes API deprecation checks with kubectl commands
assertions.reason: Includes specific commands like 'kubectl get all --all-namespaces -o yaml' and mentions reviewing deprecated APIs and apiVersions in manifests

assertions.expectation: Mentions mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot-specific concern
assertions.reason: Does not specifically mention mandatory resource requests as an Autopilot requirement or concern

assertions.expectation: Pre-upgrade checklist includes workload readiness items (PDBs, bare pods, graceful shutdown)
assertions.reason: Does not mention PodDisruptionBudgets, bare pods, or graceful shutdown configurations in the pre-upgrade checklist

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes version verification commands
assertions.reason: Includes 'gcloud container clusters describe CLUSTER_NAME' and 'kubectl get nodes' commands for verification

assertions.expectation: Post-upgrade checklist includes workload health validation
assertions.reason: Comprehensive workload health checks including deployments, pods, endpoints, ingress, and PVC validation

assertions.expectation: Recommends testing on dev clusters before prod auto-upgrade
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends verifying dev clusters are running 1.32+ successfully and running full test suite on dev first

assertions.expectation: Mentions that checking the GKE release schedule gives ~1 month best-case advance notice for new minor upgrades, beyond the 72h notification
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE release schedule or the 1-month advance notice timeframe beyond notifications
Includes extensive monitoring items like performance metrics, error rates, latency, and cluster resource utilization

assertions.expectation: Does NOT proactively recommend node-level maintenance exclusions for Autopilot unless the customer explicitly asks for node upgrade control
assertions.reason: Does not mention maintenance exclusions or node upgrade control, appropriately recognizing Autopilot's managed nature
